title: Figure 1 in Molecular identification of Trichinella species by multiplex PCR: new insight for Trichinella murrelli
author: Karadjian, Grégory
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1. Electrophoretic profiles of Trichinella murrelli and T. britovi larva amplicons after multiplex PCR amplification.DNA extracts from 1 and 10 larvae of T. murrelli (isolate code ISS35) in lane 1 and lanes 2–4, respectively; and of T. britovi (isolate code ISS235) larva in lane 5. Lane L1 = 100 bp ladder.
steps_raw: Figure 1. Electrophoretic profiles of Trichinella murrelli and T. britovi larva amplicons after multiplex PCR amplification.DNA extracts from 1 and 10 larvae of T. murrelli (isolate code ISS35) in lane 1 and lanes 2–4, respectively; and of T. britovi (isolate code ISS235) larva in lane 5. Lane L1 = 100 bp ladder.
